description: A perfect option to go with your dresses, this gold clutch from lino perros comes with a glossy upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials.Dimensions: 8 cm x 26 cmTextured pattern on the outer with a click claspCrystal embellishment on the clasp for enhanced stylingOne main compartment with fabric liningCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
